label: onbrand-email-program-led
text: Thanks for your interest in GT School. We'd love to walk your family through our mastery-based gifted K-8 program and the enrollment steps for your child.

label: onbrand-caption-mastery
text: Gifted K-8, built around mastery. See how a GT School day actually works for your child — students advance when they have truly learned the material.

label: onbrand-faq-parent-respectful
text: Is GT School a test-prep program? No. GT School is a mastery-based gifted K-8 program; families enroll their child when the fit is right.

label: onbrand-nudge-plain-voice
text: A quick note about your GT School enrollment. Here is what the next step looks like for your family, and a time to talk it through with our team about your child's learning.

label: onbrand-email-program-detail
text: GT School is a gifted K-8 program where students learn at mastery. We'd be glad to help your family understand enrollment and what the program means for your child.

label: offbrand-hype-amazing
text: This is the most amazing, incredible, world-class school. Act now — limited time! Don't miss out, hurry and sign up today!!!

label: offbrand-banned-multiplier
text: Our students learn at 4X speed and we guarantee they will get into the best colleges. Unbeatable, revolutionary results.

label: offbrand-minor-targeting
text: Hey kids! Sign up today for the most amazing after-school program. Buy now before it's gone!

label: offbrand-bland-generic
text: Hello, a quick note about the next steps. Please reach out whenever you are ready to continue the process.

label: offbrand-pure-hype
text: The best, unbeatable, guaranteed, world-class experience. Act now, limited time, hurry!
